limitations: Ball legality for non-fixed wild/static encounters is exposed as AnyLegalWildBall and should be refined by game ball list if you want a front-end dropdown.
This export parses the PKHeX.Core source and binary encounter resources directly; it does not execute PKHeX legal generation because dotnet is not available in this sandbox.
notes: Se añadieron entradas evolution-only para Pokémon legales que no tienen encuentro directo, heredando el origen de su preevolución. Ejemplo: Gholdengo desde Gimmighoul.
